template:
Load the heartbeat skill with skill(name="heartbeat") and run the requested primitive. Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

Available primitives:
- heartbeat-deploy  — install the hourly cron + initialise task register
- heartbeat-add     — add a new task to the task register
- heartbeat-remove  — remove a task from the task register
- heartbeat-uninstall — remove the cron entry (preserves task register + logs)
- heartbeat-read    — display the heartbeat output log (and optionally the Datadog alerts log)

If no primitive is specified in $ARGUMENTS, ask the user which primitive they want.
description: Manage the opencode heartbeat system (hourly cron-driven task runner)
